title: Improve branch filtering UX
description:
Make it obvious that shared filter terms narrow the branch list without hiding the current selection too early.

  • Keep matching branches visible
  • Preserve keyboard flow while filtering
  • Show the active filter in the footer

title: Keep filtered branch results readable
description:
Refine the branch list so matching entries stay easy to scan even when several names contain the same token.

Use wi as the shared filter term and keep the most relevant rows visible. Readable results matter more than raw branch count.

title: Add reproducible VHS demo setup
description:
Build a deterministic demo environment so the VHS assets always show the same repository state and work item details.

Notes

No live Azure DevOps dependency. The demo should resolve feature/wi103 to a local fixture and render the details pane consistently.

cargo build --quiet
./scripts/setup-vhs-demo-repo.sh
vhs docs/tapes/cazdo-open-nav.tape
  • Create a temp repository with a local bare origin
  • Load fixture work items from JSON
  • Keep the generated GIF and still image reproducible

title: Show remote branch work item details
description:
Remote View

When the tape toggles to origin, the selected branch should still resolve to a fixture-backed work item and show realistic metadata.

title: Load fixture work items in demo mode
description:
Keep demo mode isolated from real credentials by loading local work item data when CAZDO_DEMO_WORK_ITEMS is set.

CAZDO_DEMO_WORK_ITEMS=docs/tapes/demo-work-items.json
cazdo

title: Polish demo capture workflow
description:
Clean up the capture workflow so the checked-in GIF and still image can be regenerated from the fixture repo without manual setup.

Follow-up: keep the still image centered on a branch with a real description.
